sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27441" key="di/sabos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δίσᾱβος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> hyperdor. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίσηβος,</foreign> <sense id="n27441.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twice young,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.26</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
